inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: Current body weight of the individual in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current body weight of the individual in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireyin kilogram cinsinden mevcut vücut ağırlığı.

inputs.businessContext: Target weight to achieve in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target weight to achieve in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids cible à atteindre en kilogrammes.

inputs.label: Timeframe
inputs.businessContext: Number of weeks over which the weight change is planned.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of weeks over which the weight change is planned.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Wochen, über die die Gewichtsänderung geplant ist.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity factor (1.2 = sedentary, 1.375 = light exercise, 1.55 = moderate, 1.725 = heavy, 1.9 = athlete).

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity factor (1.2 = sedentary, 1.375 = light exercise, 1.55 = moderate, 1.725 = heavy, 1.9 = athlete).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel aktivite faktörü (1.2 = hareketsiz, 1.375 = hafif egzersiz, 1.55 = orta, 1.725 = ağır, 1.9 = atlet).
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor für körperliche Aktivität (1,2 = sitzend, 1,375 = leichte Bewegung, 1,55 = mäßig, 1,725 = schwer, 1,9 = Athlet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'activité physique (1,2 = sédentaire, 1,375 = exercice léger, 1,55 = modéré, 1,725 = intense, 1,9 = athlète).
